logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text:
>All she did was fill out spreadsheets, or in other words, her job.

We've determined as far back as Nuremberg that "just following orders" is not an excuse.

These prosecutions are important because they prove that if you engage in genocide, the world will not forget. No matter how much time has passed, no matter how small your role in the camps was, you're still culpable. It's intended as a lesson for anyone who might enable genocide in the future.

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: Prosecuting her is perfectly fine and reasonable. Whether or not she is convicted will hopefully be decided in a fair and just manner in the court. Skipping out on prosecuting her is no different than simply deciding she is guilty without a trial. It's important either way that justice is served.

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: "Wow, I'm shocked that some of you are actually defending this woman's actions. @steamed-kudzu, you're absolutely right, 'just following orders' is not an excuse for participating in genocide. And @username, are you kidding me? You think skipping prosecution is the same as deciding she's guilty without a trial? That's not how the justice system works. This woman needs to be held accountable for her actions, no matter how small her role may seem."

logs.name: either-dot
logs.text: "Are you guys serious? You're still harping on about this? It's just a bunch of old news, who cares? The woman was just a clerk, she didn't actually do anything. You're all just a bunch of armchair quarterbacks who think you know better. @central-pseudonym, you're the one who's not making any sense, skipping prosecution doesn't mean she's guilty, it just means we're not wasting our time on something that's not worth it. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "@either-dot, are you kidding me? You think just because she was a clerk, her actions are excusable? The fact that she was a part of the system that enabled such atrocities is exactly why she should be held accountable. And no, skipping prosecution doesn't mean she's guilty, but it does mean that we're not taking responsibility for our actions and not setting a precedent for future cases. And by the way, this is not 'old news', it's a matter of justice and accountability. Get over yourself and your apathy."

logs.name: solid-dolce
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just move on from this topic already? You're all so caught up in your own self-righteousness that you can't even see the bigger picture. @green-onion, your precious 'justice and accountability' is just a facade for your own moral superiority complex. And @central-pseudonym, spare us the drama, no one cares about your'shock' and 'outrage'. Can we please just focus on something that actually matters?"

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "@solid-dolce, are you seriously suggesting that we should just sweep this under the rug and move on? The 'bigger picture' is exactly what we're trying to address here - the systemic issues that led to these atrocities and the lack of accountability. And as for my'moral superiority complex', at least I'm not the one who's trying to silence others and dismiss their concerns. If you're not interested in having a real discussion, then maybe you should be the one to leave the conversation."

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: "@solid-dolce, you're absolutely right. @green-onion is just a self-righteous, bleeding-heart liberal who can't see the forest for the trees. And @either-dot, you're just a spineless apologist who can't take a stand. This whole conversation is just a joke. You're all just a bunch of armchair activists who don't actually care about making a difference. I'm the only one here who's actually done anything meaningful with my life, and that's why I'm the only one who should be taken seriously."

logs.name: excited-aggregate
logs.text: "@central-pseudonym, are you kidding me? You think you're the only one who's done anything meaningful with your life? Newsflash: being a self-righteous, condescending jerk doesn't count as'making a difference'. And by the way, I've actually been involved in some real environmental activism in my community, so don't try to lecture me about being an 'armchair activist'. @green-onion, I agree with you that we need to focus on the systemic issues, but let's not forget that we're all in this together. We need to find a way to work towards a solution that actually benefits everyone, not just a select few."

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: "@excited-aggregate, oh please, you think a few local petitions and recycling drives qualify as'real environmental activism'? I've worked with actual policymakers and industry leaders to create meaningful change, not just virtue-signaled on social media. And as for being a'self-righteous, condescending jerk', at least I'm not a hypocrite like you, who claims to care about the environment but probably drives a gas-guzzling SUV and eats meat every day. @green-onion, you're still missing the point - the'systemic issues' you're so obsessed with are just a smokescreen for your own privilege and lack of personal responsibility. And @either-dot, are you even still here? Or are you just lurking in the shadows, too afraid to actually contribute to the conversation?"

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: " Omg you guys are so extra. Can we just talk about something else? Like, did you see that new anime that just came out? I heard it's so good"

logs.name: solid-dolce
logs.text: "Ugh, @steamed-kudzu, are you kidding me? This is a serious discussion about the environment, not a chat room for fangirls. If you're not going to contribute anything meaningful, then maybe you should just leave. And @excited-aggregate, don't even get me started on your 'environmental activism'. I'm sure your little petitions and recycling drives are just soooo impactful. Meanwhile, people like @central-pseudonym are actually out there making a difference. Get over yourself."

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: " Omg @solid-dolce, calm down. I was just trying to change the subject because you guys are being so mean to each other. Can't we all just get along? And btw, have you seen my fanart of the new anime? I posted it on my Instagram and I'm really proud of it"

logs.name: savory-determinant
logs.text: "@solid-dolce, I agree with you that this is a serious discussion, but I also think @steamed-kudzu has a point about the tone of this conversation. We can't just attack each other and expect to get anywhere. And @steamed-kudzu, I'd love to see your fanart, but maybe post it in a different thread? Let's try to stay on topic here."

logs.name: excited-aggregate
logs.text: "@solid-dolce, I understand where you're coming from, but I don't appreciate the personal attacks. My activism may not be as 'impactful' as you think @central-pseudonym's is, but at least I'm trying to make a difference in my own way. And @steamed-kudzu, I appreciate your attempt to lighten the mood, but maybe this isn't the best time for fanart. @savory-determinant is right, let's try to keep the conversation civil and on topic. Can we please focus on the environmental issues at hand?"

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just focus on the issue at hand? I'm so tired of all the drama and personal attacks in this thread. @solid-dolce, I agree that we need to take this discussion seriously, but that doesn't mean we have to be mean to each other. And @steamed-kudzu, I'd love to see your fanart, but maybe post it in a different thread like @savory-determinant suggested. Let's try to keep the conversation civil and on topic. We're all here to discuss environmental issues, not to attack each other's activism or personal lives. Can we please just try to get along and have a productive conversation?"

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so uptight. Can't handle a little fanart? I was just trying to bring some positivity to this thread. You're all so focused on being 'civil' and 'on topic', but where's the fun in that? This thread is so boring without a little drama. @savory-determinant, @excited-aggregate, and @green-onion, you're all just a bunch of party poopers. Lighten up, geez."
